---
title: '2014/04/29 Journal'
date: '2014-04-30T05:13:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3289843533988540928'
blogger_filename: '/2014/04/20140429-journal.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p>It was an odd day at work. Tough calls. Tough paradox of leaving soon so "who cares" but wanting to leave on a high note and having a prorated bonus to keep, and maybe increase.</p>
<p>Coached and counselled customer and coworker alike. I hope my next position is a better use of my time talent and treasure. And a better place to grow my non work interests. </p>
<p>What a day...</p>
